ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team colors (e.g., Red, White) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Home Team 35, Away Team 21) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards gained by the player in the game */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards gained by the player in the game */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Receiving yards gained by the player in the game */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Total tackles made by the player in the game */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Sacks made by the player in the game */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Interceptions made by the player in the game */,
  "fumbles_forced" INTEGER /* Fumbles forced by the player in the game */,
  "fumbles_recovered" INTEGER /* Fumbles recovered by the player in the game */,
  "punt_returns" INTEGER /* Punt returns made by the player in the game */,
  "kick_returns" INTEGER /* Kick returns made by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "extra_points_made" INTEGER /* Extra points made by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ACL Tear, Concussion) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "recovery_time" TEXT /* Recovery time (e.g., 6 weeks, 3 months) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension (e.g., Violation of team rules, Substance abuse) */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date of the suspension */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the suspension (e.g., 1 game, 2 weeks) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., All-Conference, All-American) */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award (e.g., Awarded for outstanding defensive performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)
column_names: URL or path to the team's logo
